name: robinhood-pp-mcp
description: Welcome to Robinhood Crypto Trading API documentation for traders and developers!

robinhood_api_key.title: ROBINHOOD_API_KEY
robinhood_api_key.description: Sets ROBINHOOD_API_KEY for the Robinhood Crypto Trading MCP server. Get a credential from https://robinhood.com/account/crypto.

robinhood_private_key_b64.title: ROBINHOOD_PRIVATE_KEY_B64
robinhood_private_key_b64.description: Sets the base64 Ed25519 private signing key for the Robinhood Crypto Trading MCP server. Create credentials at https://robinhood.com/account/crypto.
